notes: Attendance fields (tapr_att_*, tapr_chronic_abs_*) have measure_year=2024 because TEA distributes 2024 attendance data in the 2024-25 TAPR release.
TEA masking codes -1/-2/-3 and blank values are all stored as null. The tapr_suppression_codes column preserves the original per-campus codes.

Teacher turnover, teacher certification, LRE/inclusion, DAEP rate, ISS, OSS, expulsion, restraint, and seclusion are excluded because they are not present in the verified 2024-25 TAPR campus files (see research/tapr_discovery.md).

fields.suppression_notes: TEA masking codes: -1 (small denominator / suppressed), -2 (invalid or improbable), -3 (complementary suppression). Blank also treated as unavailable. All mapped to null. See tapr_suppression_codes for the original per-campus codes.

fields.description: TAPR release year (2025 = 2024-25 TAPR). Attendance and chronic-absence fields refer to measure_year=2024; all other TAPR fields refer to measure_year=2025.
True if this campus appeared in at least one of the three TAPR statewide files; False if not found (all TAPR fields will be null).

JSON object mapping original TAPR field name to the suppression code for any field that was masked or blank for this campus. Codes: -1 (small denominator), -2 (invalid/improbable), -3 (complementary suppression), 'blank' (empty cell). Null if no fields were suppressed.
